SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-19-2018 IS OFF CALENDAR, DISMISSAL FILED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. VENUE DOES NOT LIE IN SAN FRANCISCO BECAUSE THIS ACTION SOUNDS IN TORT AND THE INJURIES PLAINTIFF COMPLAINS OF (PROFESSIONAL NEGLIGENCE BY HIS ACCOUNTANT) DID NOT OCCUR IN THIS COUNTY. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)

(SC-105A)ORDER ON REQUEST FOR COURT ORDER (SMALL CLAIMS)THE COURT MAKES THE FOLLOWING ORDERS: YOU MUST GO TO COURT IF YOU WANT TO BE HEARD.[X] BRING EVIDENCE TO THE HEARING TO SUPPORT YOUR REQUEST.[X] EXPLANATION FOR DECISION: IT APPEARS THAT VENUE IS PROPER BECAUSE SERVICES WERE RENDERED IN THIS COUNTY,BUT THE COURT WILL COMBINE THE VENUE HEARING WITH ITS HEARING ON THE MERITS.
ORDER DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF NIKAS, ALEX AS TO DEFENDANT HURWITZ & CO, INC.

IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY LEWIS HURWITZ, PRESIDENT. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
